originalTitle: Live RL dev on PufferLib with Joseph Suarez
title: Fixing Multi-Discrete Bug and Integrating Fuse Scan Kernel in Puffer 4
summary: Fixed the multi-discrete sampling bug using a custom CUDA kernel and integrated a community kernel PR that improved fuse scan forward speed by 2-3x. Added variable num agent support across environments and began porting the drive environment to Puffer 4, though CUDA graph memory issues remain.
